meta.name: Gamify Keephub form response times and email a ranked leaderboard via Gmail

nodes.name: Get submitter details for a form submission
Calculate response duration for a form submission

parameters.content:
## 🏆 Gamify form response times and email a ranked leaderboard with Keephub

Turn any Keephub form into a timed competition. Paste in a Form ID, and this workflow fetches all submissions, ranks participants by response speed, enriches results with org-unit data, and emails you a polished HTML leaderboard — fully automated.

**Who it's for:** HR teams, L&D managers, or anyone running timed Keephub form challenges who wants an instant, shareable results report.

## How it works
1. 📋 Someone submits the start form with their email, a Keephub Form ID, and an optional competition start date and time
2. ⏱️ The workflow fetches all submissions and calculates each response time (from the custom start if provided, otherwise Keephub's default)
3. 👤 Each result is enriched with the user's name and org unit from the Keephub orgchart
4. 📧 A ranked leaderboard (top 10 + org-unit breakdown) is built and emailed as a beautiful HTML report

## Setup steps
1. 📦 Install **n8n-nodes-keephub** verified node (v1.5+) from Settings
2. 🔑 Connect your Keephub Bearer token or Keephub Login credential in any Keephub node
3. 📬 Connect your Gmail (or SMTP) account in the Send Competition Report node
4. 🔗 Find your Form ID from the Keephub form URL
5. ▶️ Click **Test workflow**, fill in the n8n form, and check your inbox

## 📥 Fetch submissions
Collects all form submissions from Keephub for the given Form ID and splits them into individual items for per-user processing.

## ⚙️ Process & enrich
Calculates response duration per submission — using the custom start time when provided, or Keephub’s default (time since form creation). Fetches submitter details and resolves org-unit names from the orgchart. Nodes continue on error so one bad record won’t stop the report.

## 📊 Build & send
Aggregates stats, builds a ranked HTML leaderboard with org-unit breakdown, and emails the competition report to the requester.

values.formSubmittedText: Processing... Please check your email shortly!

parameters.formTitle: Run a form response time competition with Keephub

values.fieldLabel: Form ID (copy from the form URL)

parameters.formDescription:
Enter your email and a Keephub Form ID to receive a detailed competition report.

Optionally provide a competition start date & time — response durations will be measured from that moment. Leave blank to use Keephub’s default (time since form creation).

The workflow fetches all submissions, calculates response times, enriches each result with org-unit data, and emails you a ranked leaderboard.
